steps.title: Convert square units
steps.content:
Since $1$ mile equals $1{,}760$ yards, square the conversion factor for area:
$$
1\text{ square mile}=1{,}760^2=3{,}097{,}600\text{ square yards}
$$

steps.title: Divide by square yards
steps.content: Convert the area by dividing by the number of square yards in one square mile: $$ \frac{13{,}226{,}752}{3{,}097{,}600}=4.27 $$ The answer is B.
